title: Zappier Integration with quickbooks time
excerpt: I use quickbooks time formely t-sheets to track our time online and that integrates with QB desktop.  I would llike to integrate QB Time with monday.com.  the goal is to enter time in Monday and then be able to sync the …

posts.author: TrueParallel (Mark Rosenberg)
posts.cookedHtml: I use quickbooks time formely t-sheets to track our time online and that integrates with QB desktop. I would llike to integrate QB Time with monday.com. the goal is to enter time in Monday and then be able to sync the time with QB Desktop (NOT ONLINE!!). If i can just get quickbooks time to work with monday we are good as QB time already synchs with QB desktop. Can somone help?

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @TrueParallel
Do you mean that you’re looking for someone to help you build an integration between monday and QB? or do you have an existing challenge with building a Zapier automation?
